2603.23951.title: From AI Assistant to AI Scientist: Autonomous Discovery of LLM-RL Algorithms with LLM Agents
2603.23951.paper_summary: Discovering improved policy optimization algorithms for language models remains a costly manual process requiring repeated mechanism-level modification and validation. Unlike simple combinatorial code search, this problem requires searching over algorithmic mechanisms tightly coupled with training dynamics while reusing empirical evidence across iterations. We propose POISE, a closed-loop framework for automated discovery of policy optimization algorithms for language models. POISE maintains a structured, genealogically linked archive linking proposals, executable implementations, standardized evaluations, and natural-language reflections to support evidence-driven iteration. In mathematical reasoning experiments starting from GRPO, POISE evaluates 64 candidate algorithms and discovers improved mechanisms, including analytic-variance scaling and validity masking. The best variant improves weighted Overall from 47.8 to 52.5 (+4.6) and increases AIME25 pass@32 from 26.7% to 43.3%, demonstrating the feasibility of automated policy optimization discovery while supporting interpretable design principles.
2603.23951.paper_summary_zh: 發現改進的語言模型政策優化算法仍然是一個昂貴的手動過程，需要重複的機制級別修改和驗證。<lb/>與簡單的組合代碼搜索不同，這個問題需要在與訓練動態緊密耦合的算法機制上進行搜索，同時在迭代過程中重用經驗證據。<lb/>我們提出了POISE，一個自動發現語言模型政策優化算法的閉環框架。<lb/>POISE維護一個結構化的、世系鏈接的檔案，將提案、可執行實現、標準化評估和自然語言反思聯繫起來，以支持基於證據的迭代。<lb/>在以GRPO為起點的數學推理實驗中，POISE評估了64個候選算法，並發現了改進的機制，包括分析方差縮放和有效性遮罩。<lb/>最佳變體將加權整體從47.8提高到52.5（+4.6），並將AIME25 pass@32從26.7%提高到43.3%，展示了自動政策優化發現的可行性，同時支持可解釋的設計原則。
2603.23951.author: Sirui Xia et.al.
2603.23951.authors: Sirui Xia, Yikai Zhang, Aili Chen, Siye Wu, Siyu Yuan, Yanghua Xiao
